image_metadata.caption: There exists a sequence of rectangles, R{{< sub "i" >}}, i = 0, ..., N + 1 such that R{{< sub "0" >}} = Q{{< sub "0" >}}, R{{< sub "N+1" >}} = Q and Int R{{< sub "i" >}} -intersect- Int R{{< sub "i+1" >}} is non-empty. (Figure by Prof. Victor Guillemin.)
image_metadata.image-alt: Image of a sequence of rectangles.
